mackerel-with-oven-roasted-vegetables-te.name: Mackerel With Oven-roasted Vegetables
mackerel-with-oven-roasted-vegetables-te.original_name: Carapaus com legumes assados no forno
instructions: Descasque e corte as cebolas em rodelas; corte os tomates em rodelas; descasque a cenoura e corte-a em rodelas finas; descasque os alhos e corte-os em fatias.
Numa travessa de forno, espalhe primeiro as rodelas de cebola e depois o tomate, a cenoura e o alho. Tempere com sal, pimenta e um pouco de vinho branco.
Disponha por cima os carapaus, regue com bastante azeite e tempere-os com um pouco de sal e pimenta.
Take the tragedy in the oven, preheated to 180 Serves with tasteful accompaniment.

madeleine-argiro.name: Madeleine

ingredients.item: A little sugar icing for garnishing
A little sugar icing for garnishing

instructions: Shake flour, baking powder and salt in a bowl.
Melt in a small pot and heat the butter for a few minutes until it is caramelized and darkened and let it cool.
Beat the eggs and fine crystalline sugar with a hand mixer for at least 6 minutes, until triple in volume.
Add the lemon zest gently.
Incorporate half the mixture of sifted materials into the egg mixture, gently folding with a spatula so that we don't lose its volume.
In the same way we then incorporate the other sifted materials.
Add half the melted cold butter, gently folding with spatula. Similarly, add the remaining butter.
Allow the mixture to cool for 30 minutes.
Preheat the evening to 160°C in the air.
Butter lightly the mantle cases and touch spoonfuls of the mixture in the center of each case.
Bake on the medium grill of the oven for about 11 minutes, until slightly puffed and the center stabilizes.
Turn the mandlenes over to a grill to cool completely and sprinkle them with minimum sugar.

make-ahead-marsala-turkey-gravy.name: Make-ahead Marsala Turkey Gravy

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat oil in a Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Place turkey necks in the Dutch oven and cook until golden brown, 5 to 7 minutes. Stir in onion, celery, and carrot; cook and stir until onion is soft and slightly brown, about 5 minutes.
Pour Marsala wine over turkey necks; increase heat to high and bring to a boil while scraping the browned bits off of the bottom of the pan. Simmer until wine is reduced by half, 3 to 4 minutes.

Stir in water, 1/4 ounce dried porcini mushrooms, garlic, and bay leaf. Bring to a boil then decrease heat to low; simmer, skimming any foam or fat that rises to the top. Cover the Dutch oven almost completely; simmer until meat is falling off the bones, 4 to 5 hours. Strain turkey stock carefully into a clean container and cool completely, about 2 hours.
Place 1/4 ounce dry porcini mushrooms in a bowl and cover with warm water; soak until mushrooms are soft enough to dice, about 15 minutes. Drain, squeezing out excess water, and dice. Set aside.
Melt butter in saucepan over medium heat. Add diced porcini mushrooms; cook and stir until browned, about 5 minutes.
Stir flour into mushrooms and butter; cook and stir until flour is no longer gritty, about 3 minutes.

Whisk in turkey stock, increase heat to medium-high and bring to a simmer. Simmer, stirring occasionally, until sauce is 1/3 reduced and thick, 15 to 20 minutes. Stir in cream, season with salt and pepper to taste.

make-ahead-mashed-potatoes.name: Make-ahead Mashed Potatoes

ingredients.item: A potato ricer or food mill fitted with fine disk

instructions: Place 4 lb. medium Yukon Gold potatoes, scrubbed, in a large pot and pour in cold water to cover by 1". Add a large handful of kosher salt (water should taste briny, like the ocean) and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until potatoes are very tender but not crumbly, 30–40 minutes. Drain and return potatoes to warm pot to dry (off heat).
Meanwhile, heat ⅔ cup heavy cream and ⅔ cup whole milk in a small saucepan over medium until just about to simmer. Reduce heat to low and keep warm until ready to add to potatoes.

Pass hot potatoes and 1¼ cups (2½ sticks) unsalted butter, cut into pieces, through ricer into a large bowl (this will help combine them quickly; most of the skins should stay behind, but pick out any small pieces that get through if you want); season generously with salt. Mix with a potato masher until butter is melted and combined.
Mixing constantly, gradually add warm cream mixture to mashed potatoes, then mix in ½ cup sour cream. Taste and season with salt and freshly ground black pepper as desired.

Transfer mashed potatoes to a baking dish or other shallow container, let them cool completely, then cover and chill for up to 2 days. To serve, transfer potatoes to a small pot and add ⅓ cup heavy cream and ⅓ cup whole milk; reheat over medium-low, stirring often (but gently) to prevent scorching.
Editor’s note: This recipe for make-ahead mashed potatoes was first printed in our November 2018 issue; it has been updated for style. Head this way for more great make-ahead Thanksgiving recipes →

instructions: To prepare this quick mango pie, take the melting butter to the fire. Apart, crush the cookie and add it to the butter. Peel the sleeve and roll it. In the meantime pour the creams into a bowl and whip them in firm whipped cream with sugar. Add the mango pulp and gelatine, involving carefully.

mani-spoons-argiro.name: Mani Spoons

ingredients.item: Honey or cinnamon sugar for serving
Honey or cinnamon sugar for serving

instructions: Mix flour, salt and water in a bowl until we have a homogeneous porridge.
Let him stand 15-30 minutes.
Heat in a pan and heat the olive oil in medium heat.
Once it burns, pour spoonfuls of the mixture by forming pancakes.
Leave them for 11⁄2 minutes and then turn them to brown from the other side.
Remove the spoons on absorbent paper to drain the excess oil.
Pour them with honey or sprinkle them with cinnamon sugar and serve.

maple-leaf-cocktail.name: Maple Leaf Cocktail
instructions: Combine blueberries, maple syrup, and juice of 1 lime wedge in a cocktail shaker. Use a muddler to crush the fruit. Fill shaker with ice cubes and whiskey. Cover and shake until chilled, 15 to 20 seconds.
Fill a rocks glass with ice and strain cocktail over the ice. Top with club soda. Garnish with remaining lime wedge.

maple-pecan-shortbread-squares.name: Maple Pecan Shortbread Squares
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Combine flour and 1/3 cup brown sugar in a mixer. Mix in softened butter until a dough has formed. Press into an ungreased 8x8-inch baking pan; prick dough with a fork.
Bake shortbread in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 20 minutes.

Meanwhile, beat egg in a mixing bowl along with 1/3 cup brown sugar, maple syrup, and pecans. Pour pecan mixture over hot crust, and return to oven. Continue baking until topping has firmed, 12 to 15 minutes.
Remove from oven, and immediately run a knife around the edges to prevent sticking. Cool completely, then cut into 1-inch bar cookies to serve.

marinated-peppers-with-basil-and-garlic.name: Marinated Peppers With Basil And Garlic

ingredients.prep: orange, and/or yellow bell peppers (about 2 lb.)

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Heat broiler. Broil peppers on a foil-lined rimmed baking sheet, turning with tongs every 5–7 minutes, until all sides are charred, about 20 minutes. Let sit until cool enough to handle.

Peel peppers and discard skins. Tear flesh into ½"-wide strips. Transfer to a medium bowl and add basil sprigs, garlic, oil, salt, and any juices on baking sheet; toss to combine. Cover and let sit room temperature at least 1 hour.
Top with basil leaves just before serving.

instructions: In a large bowl, spread the minced meat by hand and pour it with vinegar. We put him away.
Add the stale bread to small crumbs and keep it aside for the end.
Add to blender the onion, tomato, fresh herbs and mash them.
Add the pulped vegetables and their liquids to the minced meat.
Add salt at will and some freshly ground pepper.
Add the egg and dried herbs.
We knead the mixture, to unite well.
At this stage the minced meat has changed color and all materials have been lost inside. But it's too damp.
Add the bread crumbs a little by kneading, to absorb moisture and fluffy the mixture.
Ferment very well until no material stands out.
Cover the mixture and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 200oC in the air.
Lay non-stick paper on a large shallow baking pan.
Add a few drops of olive oil to the hands and make meatballs with walnut size. We gently push them with the hand to become wider.
Add the meatballs to the baking pan and place them on the middle grill of the oven.
Bake for 20’ until slightly golden but not dry.

mesquite-smoked-jerky.name: Mesquite Smoked Jerky

ingredients.item: Beef eye of round sliced into 1/4 inch strips

instructions: Mix together soy sauce, brown sugar, liquid smoke, garlic, paprika, and salt in a shallow glass baking dish. Lay beef strips in soy sauce mixture in a single layer. Cover the dish and refrigerate for at least 6 hours.
Arrange beef strips in a dehydrator and let dry to desired doneness, about 6 hours.

mexican-chicken-and-rice-soup-sopa-de-po.name: Mexican Chicken And Rice Soup (sopa De Pollo Y Arroz)

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Bring stock to a boil in a large pot over high heat. Add chicken legs; return to a boil. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 10 minutes, skimming away foam that forms on the surface. Add carrots, onion, celery, cilantro, garlic, and mint.
Cover pot and cook until chicken is no longer pink at the bone and the juices run clear, about 30 minutes more. Remove chicken from the pot; discard skin and bones. Shred meat using 2 forks.

Return chicken meat to the pot and season with salt and pepper. Add rice. Let chicken and rice warm up, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and pour soup into serving bowls. Top with avocado and serrano peppers and squeeze in lime juice.

mexican-jackals-recipe-step-by-step-come.name: Mexican Jackals Recipe Step By Step
mexican-jackals-recipe-step-by-step-come.original_name: Receta de chacales mexicanos paso a paso
instructions: In a casserole, pour some water and as soon as it's about to purify incorporates the guajillo chilies. It hurts for 4 minutes.
Remove the chilies from the casserole and add with the tomato and onion and garlic teeth into a blender.
Pour some of the water into the blender where the chilies were steamed and licked very well till you have a creamy sauce.
Warm up a frying pan with some oil and pour the sauce. Mix and cook 3 to 5 minutes. Turn and put them out.
Calienta una olla con 4 tazas de agua y cuando hierva, incorpora los chacales. Cocina por 30 minutos.
Pasado ese tiempo, vierte la salsa. Agrega el cilantro troceado y sazona con sal. Mezcla muy bien y termina de cocer por 15 minutos.
Once ready, serve and accompany with frosted chihuahua cheese. Enjoy!

miki-noodles-with-smoked-ham-chicken-and.name: Miki Noodles With Smoked Ham, Chicken, And Shrimp

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken thighs (about 2), cut into 1" pieces

ingredients.item: . achiote (annatto) powder or  0.5 tsp. paprika plus  0.5 tsp. turmeric

ingredients.prep: lemon-flavored olive oil (optional), and soft-boiled eggs, halved (for serving)

instructions: Mix 3¾ cups plus 1 Tbsp. (477 g) all-purpose flour and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a large bowl to combine.
Whisk 1 large egg, 1 large egg yolk, ¼ cup vegetable oil, ½ tsp. food-grade lye water, and ⅔ cup plus 3 Tbsp. water in a medium bowl to combine.

Make a well in the center of dry ingredients and pour in egg mixture. Using your hands or a wooden spoon, incorporate dry ingredients until a shaggy dough comes together; mix in up to 1 Tbsp. more water if any patches of dry flour remain. Transfer dough to a lightly floured surface and knead until smooth and cohesive, 8–10 minutes. Cover with plastic wrap and let rest at room temperature at least 10 minutes and up to 1 hour.

Divide dough in half. Working with 1 half and keeping remaining half covered, roll out dough on a lightly floured surface into a long, narrow ⅛"–¼"-thick rectangle. Dust lightly with flour. Starting at a short end, fold dough into thirds (do not to press too firmly; you want to keep dough from sticking to itself). Cut into ¼"-wide ribbons with a sharp knife. Gently unfurl ribbons and transfer to a lightly floured rimmed baking sheet. Repeat with remaining half of dough.
Do ahead: Dough can be made 1 day ahead. Wrap in plastic and chill. Bring to room temperature before using.

Combine 2 large smoked ham hocks, 1 medium onion, halved, 4 garlic cloves, crushed, 2 bay leaves, and 1 tsp. black peppercorns in a medium Dutch oven or other heavy pot. Pour in 2 quarts low-sodium chicken broth and bring to a boil. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer, adding more water if needed, until hocks are tender and meat is falling off the bone, 2–3 hours.

Meanwhile, place 4 dried shiitake mushrooms in a small heatproof bowl and pour 1 cup boiling water over. Let sit until mushrooms are softened, about 30 minutes. Squeeze out rehydrated mushrooms over bowl to release as much liquid as possible, then thinly slice. Reserve mushroom soaking liquid.

Strain broth through a fine-mesh sieve into a large bowl; reserve ham hocks. Transfer ham hocks to a cutting board and let sit until cool enough to handle. Pick meat from hocks and tear into bite-size pieces; discard fat, skin, bones, and cartilage. Set meat aside.

Heat 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Cook 8 oz. skin-on, boneless chicken thighs (about 2), cut into 1" pieces, until browned on 2 sides, about 4 minutes per side. Add 1 lb. large shrimp, peeled, deveined, coarsely chopped, 6 garlic cloves, thinly sliced, and rehydrated mushrooms and cook, stirring often, until garlic is fragrant and translucent, about 2 minutes. Stir in 2 Tbsp. fish sauce, 1 tsp. achiote (annatto) powder or ½ tsp. paprika plus ½ tsp. turmeric. Pour in ham hock broth and reserved mushroom soaking liquid and bring to a simmer, scraping up any browned bits. Add noodles and cook, stirring occasionally and adding up to ½ cup water if broth is getting too thick, until noodles are very tender, shrimp is opaque, and broth is slightly thickened, 10–12 minutes.
Divide soup among bowls. Top with reserved ham hock meat, 1 bunch scallions, thinly sliced, store-bought fried garlic (if using), lemon-flavored olive oil (if using), and soft-boiled eggs, halved.

minced-meat-cokertme-kebab-recipe-lezzet.name: Minced Meat Roaster Kebab Recip Home

mini-skillet-buttermilk-pear-pies.name: Mini Skillet Buttermilk-pear Pies
instructions: Combine 2 1/2 cups sugar, water, cinnamon syrup, and cinnamon sticks in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add pears, cover, and cook for 20 minutes. Strain pears and save poaching liquid for future recipes if desired. Let pears cool.
Cut pears lengthwise into mini slices, leaving the stem end intact.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease 4 mini oven-proof skillets.

Roll out pie pastry and cut out circles 1/2- to 3/4-inch larger than the mini skillets. Fit dough into the skillets, leaving room for overhang. Lay foil or parchment paper on top of the dough and place pie weights or beans on top.
Bake pie crusts in the preheated oven for 10 to 15 minutes to reduce any shrinking of the crust. Remove foil and weights and let crust cool while preparing the filling; leave oven turned on.
Whisk together 2 cups sugar, flour, nutmeg, and salt in a small bowl and set aside.

Whisk eggs in a large bowl to break them up. Mix in buttermilk, lemon juice, and lemon zest until well combined. Add the sugar-flour mixture and mix well. Stir in melted butter and vanilla paste until just combined.
Divide walnuts among the prebaked crusts, followed by the reserved sliced pears. Pour about 1 cup of the buttermilk mixture into each skillet. Place skillets on a large baking sheet.
Bake for 35 minutes. Reduce heat to 171°C (170 degrees C) and bake until center is set but still slightly jiggly, about 15 minutes more. Place pies on a wire rack and let cool completely.

miso-carrot-and-sesame-dressing.name: Miso, Carrot, And Sesame Dressing
instructions: Place all ingredients plus 1/4 cup water in a resealable container. Cover and shake vigorously until well combined. DO AHEAD: Can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

mixed-berry-frozen-sangria.name: Mixed Berry Frozen Sangria
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a blender, and mix until fully blended.
Serve and garnish with a strawberry.
Enjoy!

mixed-grill-with-sweet-and-spicy-bourbon.name: Mixed Grill With Sweet And Spicy Bourbon Sauce

ingredients.item: Racks meaty baby back pork ribs
Chicken thighs with skin and bones

instructions: Place sugar, next 8 ingredients, and 1 1/2 teaspoons freshly ground black pepper in large bowl. Whisk until salt dissolves. Mix in green onions.

Sprinkle pork, beef, and chicken on all sides very lightly with coarse salt and pepper. Let stand 30 minutes. Arrange pork rib racks in single layer on large rimmed baking sheet. Arrange beef short ribs in single layer in 13x9x2-inch metal baking pan. Arrange chicken in another 13x9x2-inch metal baking pan. Pour 3/4 cup marinade each over pork, beef, and chicken; turn to coat. Marinate 1 hour at room temperature. Cover, chill, and reserve remaining marinade for grilling.

Position 1 rack in top third and 1 rack in bottom third of oven and preheat to 177°C. Add beef broth to pan with short ribs; turn ribs, meat side down, in broth. Cover pork, beef, and chicken pans tightly with foil. Place pork on lower rack. Place beef and chicken on upper rack. Bake pork and chicken until tender, about 45 minutes. Remove both from oven; open foil. Continue to bake beef until tender, about 11/4 hours longer (2 hours total). Remove from oven; open foil.

Pour pan juices from pork, beef, and chicken into medium saucepan. Spoon off fat. Boil until reduced to scant 2 cups sauce, 25 to 30 minutes. Add bourbon; return sauce to boil, then remove from heat. Season with salt, pepper, and more hot chili sauce, if desired.
DO AHEAD: Can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature. Rewarm before serving.

Coat grill racks with nonstick spray and prepare barbecue (medium-high heat). Cut pork racks between bones into ribs. Brush all meat with some of reserved marinade. Grill pork, beef, and chicken until slightly charred, brushing with more marinade and turning occasionally, 12 to 15 minutes.
Mound pork, beef, and chicken on platter. Pass bourbon sauce alongside.
With the meat, pour your favorite beer. For this party, a Colorado brew—like the IPA from Odell Brewing Col. in Fort Collins (Colorado, $10 for a six-pack)—would be great.

instructions: Start the oven at 180 degrees. Prepare the caramel: take the medium heat a pot with sugar and orange juice and boil until you get a soft caramel. Use to grease a round shape with hole and reserve.
Beat the clears in castle until they form soft peaks. Add the sugar slowly, continuing to beat until they stand firm.

moose-milk.name: Moose Milk
instructions: Combine ice cream, milk, rum, coffee liqueur, and vodka in a large punch bowl; whisk until frothy and liquified.
Ladle into punch glasses and garnish with nutmeg.

morning-glory-muffins-i.name: Morning Glory Muffins I
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Lightly oil 18 muffin cups, or coat with nonstick cooking spray.
In a medium bowl, whisk together eggs, egg whites, apple butter, oil and vanilla.

In a large bowl, stir together flours, sugar, cinnamon, baking powder, baking soda and salt. Stir in carrots, apples and raisins. Stir in apple butter mixture until just moistened. Spoon the batter into the prepared muffin cups, filling them about 3/4 full.
In a small bowl, combine walnuts and wheat germ; sprinkle over the muffin tops.
Bake at 191°C (190 degrees C) for 15 to 20 minutes, or until the tops are golden and spring back when lightly pressed.

moussaka-or-chicken-moussaka-pequereceta.name: Moussaka Or Chicken Moussaka
instructions: We washed the eggplants well and cut them into slices that we do to the plate, turn and turn. Let's have a reservation. In a frying pan with some extra virgin olive oil we polish with very soft fire the onion finely minced. When we start to get some light, we put our breast with a few minutes and we cook with salt, ground comines, oregano and ground black pepper.

When the chicken breast is cooked, we add the fried tomato, mix well and reserve. At an oven fountain, we put an eggplant cape, a chicken cape, an eggplant, an eggplant, and a final eggplant. We cover with the bechamel salsa and we sprinkle with grated cheese, as you best like. We baked at 180º C, preheated oven, about 20 minutes. That Musaka or Moussaka from Pollo is... so delicious!

mushroom-quesadilla-with-blender-avocado.name: Mushroom Quesadilla With Blender Avocado Salsa

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: lightly seeded, coarsely chopped, or more to taste

ingredients.item: Zest and juice from 1 large lime

instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C.

For the quesadilla: Drizzle 2 tablespoons olive oil on a rimmed sheet pan fitted with parchment. Arrange the creminis, shiitakes and portobellos on the pan in a single layer and sprinkle with the shallots, smoked paprika, salt, pepper and 2 tablespoons water. Roast the mushrooms until they are tender when pierced with the tip of a knife, 15 to 20 minutes. Sprinkle with the pumpkin seeds.

In a large sauté pan, heat 1/2 tablespoon olive oil over medium heat. When oil begins to smoke lightly, add half the spinach and shut off the heat. Season with salt and wilt 1 to 2 minutes, stirring, then transfer to a baking sheet to cool. Repeat with the other half of the spinach. Grate lime zest over the spinach.

Cut a straight line halfway into the middle of the first tortilla. Spread cheese on the upper left quarter of the tortilla. Spread mushrooms on the upper right quarter of the tortilla. Spread cheese on the lower right quarter and the spinach on the lower left. Working clockwise, fold the upper left over the upper right. Fold the upper to the bottom right and then to the lower left. Repeat with the fillings and remaining 5 tortillas. Arrange them in a single layer on a baking sheet. Top with another baking sheet and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes and up to 6 hours.

For the salsa: In the blender, combine the cilantro, scallions, tomatillos, avocado, garlic, jalapeño, cayenne and a pinch of salt. Blend until mostly smooth. Season with a little lime zest and juice. Like it spicier? Add more jalapeño, especially the seeds. Set aside.

Cook the quesadillas: In a large sauté pan, heat 1 tablespoon oil until it smokes lightly. Add 3 quesadillas, side-by-side, and brown on the first side, 2 to 3 minutes. Use a metal spatula to flip them on their second side. Cook for an additional 2 to 3 minutes, then place the pan in the oven. Cook until hot in the center, 5 to 8 minutes. Transfer to a flat surface. Repeat with the remaining quesadillas. Alternatively, cook them all in a single layer on a large griddle or 2 to 3 skillets and transfer to a baking sheet to warm in the oven.
Arrange the quesadillas on a platter and serve with the bowl of salsa on the side. Serve with extra lime wedges, sour cream and hot sauce on the side, if desired.

mushroom-tartlets-teleculinaria.name: Mushroom Tartlets
instructions: Peel the onion and garlic teeth, cut the onion into half-moons and pinch the garlic teeth. Wash the mushrooms, drain them and cut them in rooms. Remove the skin from the sausage and cut it into small slices.

Heat the olive oil in a frying pan, add the onion and garlic and let it saute. Add the sausage and mushrooms and cook until everything is soft. Retrieve the seasonings, remove from the fire, sprinkle with coriander to taste and reserve.

Bata os ovos com o leite, tempere com sal e pimenta e reserve. Estenda a massa numa bancada polvilhada com farinha, corte seis rodelas e forre formas para tartelete. Apare o bordo e pique o fundo com um garfo.
Fill the forms with the mushrooms, water with the mixture of the eggs and bring them to the oven, preheated to 180°C, for 35 minutes. Remove from the oven, deform and let it cool. Serve right away.
